```{=html}
<script>
  window.MathJax = {
    tex: {
      macros: {
        mb: ["\\mathbf{#1}", 1],
        bs: ["\\boldsymbol{#1}", 1],
        cD: "\\mathcal{D}",
        cF: "\\mathcal{F}",
        E: "\\mathbb{E}",
        Var: "\\text{Var}",
        Cov: "\\text{Cov}",
        im: "\\text{im}"
      }
    }
  };
</script>
```

```{=html}
<style>
/* ===== Proofs ===== */
div.proof {
  border-left: 3px solid #b8b8b8;
  background: #f7f7f7;
  padding: 0.6em 1em;
  margin: 1.2em 0 1.8em;
  border-radius: 0 4px 4px 0;
}
div.proof::after {
  content: "\220E";
  display: block;
  text-align: right;
  color: #888;
}
div.proof > p:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; }
.proof-title { font-weight: 600; }

/* ===== Proof idea (always shown; pairs with a collapsible full proof) ===== */
div.proof-idea {
  border-left: 3px solid #d9a441;
  background: #fdf6e9;
  padding: 0.6em 1em;
  margin: 1.2em 0 1.8em;
  border-radius: 0 4px 4px 0;
}
div.proof-idea::before {
  content: "Idea";
  display: block;
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 0.78em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  color: #a9761a;
  margin-bottom: 0.3em;
}
div.proof-idea > p:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; }

/* ===== Collapsible full proof (reuses the proof look) ===== */
details.proof {
  border-left: 3px solid #b8b8b8;
  background: #f7f7f7;
  padding: 0.6em 1em;
  margin: 1.2em 0 1.8em;
  border-radius: 0 4px 4px 0;
}
details.proof > summary {
  cursor: pointer;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #555;
  list-style: none;
}
details.proof > summary::-webkit-details-marker { display: none; }
details.proof > summary::before { content: "\25B8\00A0"; color: #888; }
details.proof[open] > summary::before { content: "\25BE\00A0"; }
details.proof[open] > summary { margin-bottom: 0.6em; }
details.proof[open]::after {
  content: "\220E";
  display: block;
  text-align: right;
  color: #888;
}
details.proof > :last-child { margin-bottom: 0; }

/* ===== Collapsible example (descriptive name as summary; purple example look) ===== */
details.example {
  border-left: 3px solid #8e6bbf;
  background: #f5f1fb;
  padding: 0.6em 1em;
  margin: 1.2em 0 1.8em;
  border-radius: 0 4px 4px 0;
}
details.example > summary {
  cursor: pointer;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #6f4fa0;
  list-style: none;
}
details.example > summary::-webkit-details-marker { display: none; }
details.example > summary::before {
  content: "\25B8\00A0 Example";
  display: block;
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 0.78em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  color: #8e6bbf;
  margin-bottom: 0.3em;
}
details.example[open] > summary::before { content: "\25BE\00A0 Example"; }
details.example[open] > summary { margin-bottom: 0.6em; }
details.example > :last-child { margin-bottom: 0; }

/* ===== Quarto crossref environments (#thm-, #lem-, #cor-, #exm-, #def-, ...) =====
   Quarto gives ALL of them class "theorem"; subtypes add .example/.definition/etc.
   Base style = theorem family (blue); examples get a distinct colour below.
   The "Theorem 1"/"Example 1" label is supplied by Quarto in .theorem-title. */
div.theorem {
  border-left: 3px solid #2780e3;
  background: #f0f6fd;
  padding: 0.6em 1em;
  margin: 1.2em 0 1.8em;
  border-radius: 0 4px 4px 0;
}
div.theorem .theorem-title {
  display: block;
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 0.78em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  color: #1f5fab;
  margin-bottom: 0.3em;
}
div.theorem > p:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; }

/* Examples: distinct colour so they don't read as theorems */
div.theorem.example {
  border-left-color: #8e6bbf;
  background: #f5f1fb;
}
div.theorem.example .theorem-title { color: #6f4fa0; }

/* ===== Informal statement (plain-language box) ===== */
div.informal {
  border-left: 3px solid #5fa388;
  background: #eef6f2;
  padding: 0.6em 1em;
  margin: 1.2em 0 1.8em;
  border-radius: 0 4px 4px 0;
}
div.informal::before {
  content: "In words";
  display: block;
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 0.78em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  color: #3f7a63;
  margin-bottom: 0.3em;
}
div.informal > p:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; }

/* ===== Tighter gap between consecutive boxed environments ===== */
:is(div.theorem, div.informal, div.proof-idea, div.proof, details.proof, details.example)
  + :is(div.theorem, div.informal, div.proof-idea, div.proof, details.proof, details.example) {
  margin-top: 0.6em;
}
:is(div.theorem, div.informal, div.proof-idea, div.proof, details.proof, details.example):has(
  + :is(div.theorem, div.informal, div.proof-idea, div.proof, details.proof, details.example)) {
  margin-bottom: 0.6em;
}

/* ===== Headings ===== */
h2 {
  border-bottom: 2px solid #e3e3e3;
  padding-bottom: 0.3em;
  margin-top: 2.2em;
}
h4 { margin-top: 1.8em; }
h6 {
  margin-top: 1.5em;
  font-size: 0.95em;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.03em;
  color: #555;
}
/* Keep inline math in headings un-transformed: text-transform/letter-spacing
   would otherwise capitalize and spread MathJax glyphs (e.g. $n$ -> "N"). */
h6 .math,
h1 .math, h2 .math, h3 .math, h4 .math, h5 .math {
  text-transform: none;
  letter-spacing: normal;
}
</style>
```
